description: A connector is pure data: it lines the columns of a common CMMS/work-order CSV export up with the field-audit pack's fields, so you can point Aris at records you already have. Rename the left side to match your export's headers.

value_hints.cost: strip $ and commas — Aris reads money either way
value_hints.compliance_pct: a number like 98.5, not the string '98.5%'
value_hints.Outcome: your export may say Passed/Failed — those map straight through to result

note: No code here — a connector is a column-to-field map. Aris ingests the mapped records; your CSV never leaves your control except as the records you choose to load.
